saturn_png.heroHook: French illustrator Hermann as saturn_png (@saturn_png): Marché des Créateurs bio cites abstract geometry and Greek ceramics; True Grit promos show Procreate grain brushes.
saturn_png.storyFullText:
Marché des Créateurs (Luxembourg fair site) lists Saturn / saturn_png as a French illustrator and animator named Hermann working with abstract geometry and references to ancient Greek ceramics.

True Grit Texture Supply’s Instagram promotions show him using their Procreate grain brushes on geometric illustrations.

Pinterest and third-party posts reference saturnsuperstore.fr—verify product catalog on the live domain.

Treat client lists strictly from primary shop pages.

Levi Jacobs.activeSince: Freelance illustration since 2010 (LinkedIn); BDes Illustration St. Joost 2006–2010
Levi Jacobs.heroHook: Rotterdam illustrator Levi Jacobs (@levijacobss): levijacobs.nl cites freelance since 2010, St. Joost BDes; Adobe, Netflix, Apple, NYT named; mural festivals since 2014.
Levi Jacobs.storyFullText:
levijacobs.nl/info documents a Rotterdam-based freelance illustrator with a St. Joost illustration BDes and commercial clients such as Adobe, Netflix, Apple, and The New York Times.

The same page notes mural and festival participation across Europe and Asia since 2014 and awards from Dutch and European design competitions.

Behance mirrors the portfolio with large view counts.

Personal world-building projects (e.g., Planet Tropicana) are described on the info page.

Jake Ac art.heroHook: Jack AC Art (@jack_ac_art): officialjackacart.com sells card verse products; Instagram documents marker-and-ink process—limited verified press in search pass.
Jake Ac art.storyFullText:
officialjackacart.com markets collectible card products and related merchandise.

Instagram and Pinterest archives show marker-and-ink drawing processes and pop-culture subject matter.

No major interview URL was returned in the automated search pass.

Confirm legal name, city, and licensing for any branded fan art before campaigns.
Jake Ac art.notes: Sparse verifiable biography; prioritize future primary interview.

Wuper Kec.activeSince: Graffiti since 2006; brush murals for ~5+ years per Boulogne-sur-Mer blog (2024)
Wuper Kec.heroHook: Serbian muralist Wuper Kec (@wuper_kec): Street Art Boulogne-sur-Mer (2023–24) profiles brush murals; Street Art Cities lists Serbia/France markers.
Wuper Kec.storyFullText:
streetart.boulogne-sur-mer.fr documents Wuper Kec’s festival murals in France, noting a shift from spray paint to brush techniques and Soviet-realist inflected scenes.

Street Art Cities aggregates geotagged works across Serbia and France.

Behance hosts a handle tied to the same name with process imagery.

Verify each mural city and year against festival press releases.

Tania Yakunova.activeSince: Full-time illustrator from 2014; relocated to UK 2023 per yakunova.com/about
Tania Yakunova.heroHook: London illustrator Tania Yakunova (@anni_tett): yakunova.com states Kyiv origin, Arts Council England move in 2023; World Illustration Award noted on site.
Tania Yakunova.storyFullText:
yakunova.com/about describes a Kyiv-born illustrator who became full-time in 2014 and relocated to south-west London in 2023 with Arts Council England endorsement.

Her portfolio spans editorial and brand work; Behance shows large follower counts.

A public Instagram post references Weekendavisen art direction about Kyiv—verify caption wording before quoting.

Awards listed on the site include World Illustration Award and Communication Arts wins.

Ajax Blyth Piper.activeSince: Murals since 2018 (Street Art Cities); b. 1997 per same listing
Ajax Blyth Piper.heroHook: UK muralist Ajax Piper (@ajaxpiper): Street Art Cities lists Hastings base; TYPE01 (2024) interviews him on graffiti-informed Nubya typeface; murals since 2018.
Ajax Blyth Piper.storyFullText:
Street Art Cities identifies Ajax Piper as a Hastings-based muralist active since 2018 with a 1997 birth year.

TYPE01 (2024) interviews him about the Nubya display typeface bridging graffiti and calligraphic contrast.

2019 GMD London College of Communication showcase pages list student branding projects under Ajax Blyth Piper.

Cross-check any secondary Instagram handles mentioned in older articles against @ajaxpiper.

Raki.heroHook: RAF Page illustrates as RAKI (@raki.official.art): Bangkok Illustration Fair 2026 lists Philippines-based artist with playful pop imagery—verify mural list separately.
Raki.storyFullText:
The Bangkok Illustration Fair artist listing for 2025/2026 describes RAKI (Raf Page) from the Philippines with bright, nostalgic pop imagery.

Contact email raki.official.art@gmail.com appears on the same listing.

No mural database entries were returned in the quick search pass—confirm wall work from Instagram geotags.

Distinguish from unrelated brand murals using the word Raki.

Odsk.heroHook: Nantes tattooer-illustrator Anthony Daudet ODSK (@odsk_): odsk.fr boutique sells riso prints; Behance biography ties graphic design to tattoo residency.
Odsk.storyFullText:
odsk.fr positions ODSK as a Nantes tattoo and illustration studio with an online boutique for risograph prints, apparel, and flash.

Behance lists Anthony Daudet with graphic-design training leading into tattoo residency at Ultranormal.

Threads and Twitter accounts mirror the brand handle for booking announcements.

Verify guest-city dates on Instagram highlights before travel marketing.

Kaka Chazz.activeSince: Visual practice since 2008; born Três Pontas 1989 (kakachazz.com.br biografia)
Kaka Chazz.heroHook: Brazilian muralist Kaká Chazz (@kaka.chazz): kakachazz.com.br biography cites Três Pontas 1989 birth, self-taught since 2008; classical-street hybrid style.
Kaka Chazz.storyFullText:
kakachazz.com.br/biografia identifies Cassiano Henrique Cândido (Kaká Chazz) as a self-taught artist from southern Minas Gerais working since 2008.

Rádio Itatiaia reporting summarizes his murals translating everyday Minas life into large walls.

He sells originals and prints through the official shop.

Themes often highlight cerrado ecology—cross-check scientific claims with conservation partners when quoting.
Kaka Chazz.pressText: Rádio Itatiaia — — Feature on urban murals — https://www.itatiaia.com.br/porlucasmachado/kaka-chazz-o-artista-mineiro-que-transforma-o-cotidiano-em-arte-urbana

Chubby Nida.activeSince: ~12 years professional per Art of Th interview (2023)
Chubby Nida.heroHook: Bangkok illustrator Chubby Nida (@chubbynida): Collateral (EN) profiles mental-health themes; World Illustration Awards lists Wilderness Whispers project.
Chubby Nida.storyFullText:
Collateral’s English feature describes Chanida Areewatanasombat (Chubby Nida) mixing illustration, animation, collage, and embroidery around mental health and memory.

The World Illustration Awards site hosts a project page for Wilderness Whispers.

chubbynida.studio summarizes commissions for global brands—verify logos on case studies.

Thai interview outlets expand on autobiographical themes—translate carefully.
Chubby Nida.pressText:
Collateral — — English feature — https://www.collater.al/en/chubby-nida-animation-illustration-art/
World Illustration Awards — — Project listing — https://worldillustrationawards.com/projects/chubbynida-wilderness-whispers/

Lobster Robin.heroHook: Belgian muralist Lobster Robin (@lobster_robin): Northwest Walls 2024 artist page; Antwerp/Ghent base; StickerApp interview details latex-paint mural technique.
Lobster Robin.storyFullText:
northwestwalls.be documents Lobster Robin as a Belgian painter with illustration training blending fine lines with street-scale color.

Street Art Cities aggregates mural markers in Belgium.

StickerApp’s interview explains latex paint, worn brushes, and influences from comics and mural peers.

Illustrated World Series stats appear on its site—use for esports-style context only with verification.

Crackthetoy.heroHook: Indonesia-based Crack (@crackthetoy): Instagram public posts show illustration, toys, mixed-media canvas; Linktree aggregates shop links—thin long-form bio.
Crackthetoy.storyFullText:
linktr.ee/crackthetoy points to Instagram, toy shops, and NFT marketplaces.

Public Instagram posts document illustration, character design, and mixed-media paintings.

No authoritative interview URL surfaced in the automated search pass.

Confirm legal name and city with the artist before long-form editorial.

Mameko Maeda.activeSince: Professional illustrator from 2020; born Tokyo 1993 (mameko-maeda.com EN)
Mameko Maeda.heroHook: Tokyo illustrator Mameko Maeda (@mameko_maeda): mameko-maeda.com states 1993 birth, career from 2020; dance-informed body illustration; Expo 2025 Osaka mural noted.
Mameko Maeda.storyFullText:
mameko-maeda.com/en states she was born in Tokyo in 1993, began professional illustration in 2020, and studies dance-informed body dynamics.

Beyond magazine and Behance mention commercial murals including Expo 2025 Osaka and fashion campaigns—verify each credit on Japanese-language press.

VisionTrack representation is referenced on portfolio hubs.

Her humor-forward bodies target adult collectors—note content sensitivity for family marketing.

Frederique Mati.heroHook: Amsterdam illustrator Frederique Matti (@frederique.png): frederiquematti.com lists Google, Spotify, Github clients; solo painting show The Hoxton Amsterdam 2023.
Frederique Mati.storyFullText:
frederiquematti.com describes Frederique Matti as an Amsterdam-based illustrator, art director, and painter with a decade-plus career across digital and painted work.

Client lists include Google, Spotify, Github, Dropbox, Uber, and Bacardi.

She notes solo painting exhibitions including The Hoxton Amsterdam in 2023.

Display name follows Street Collector spelling Mati; surname Matti appears on the domain.

Phil Huelz.heroHook: Cologne illustrator Phil Huelz (@phil.huelz): Medium (2025) profile describes emotional playground imagery; huelz.art lists toys and prints—verify show dates on site.
Phil Huelz.storyFullText:
Medium commentary (2025) outlines Huelz’s symbolic playgrounds—slides, ladders, ponds—as emotional architecture rendered in loud color.

huelz.art sells resin art toys such as Tanglehug plus stickers and prints.

Toysrevil blog posts document toy releases for collectors.

Confirm exhibition months/years using PDFs or venue sites before catalogs.

Ollie Smither.heroHook: Devon fine-line illustrator Ollie Smither (@os.illustration): osillustration.com states solo UK operation; Quarto book Wanderlust Ink lists 2026 US/UK publication dates.
Ollie Smither.storyFullText:
osillustration.com explains that Ollie Smither runs a one-person shop for prints, apparel, tattoo licenses, and commissions from Devon.

Quarto’s catalog entry for Wanderlust Ink documents publication dates in 2026 for US and UK markets.

Linktree consolidates Instagram, TikTok, and shop gateways.

Threads follower counts are self-reported—verify before quoting.
